theme_notes: Today's touchstones: Iran attacking the UAE and Strait of Hormuz (U.S. sinking 7 Iranian boats, ships gridlocked in the Persian Gulf, oil refinery ablaze in Fujairah); the 2026 Met Gala (Madonna's 7 blindfolded helpers, Zuckerberg sneaking past the red carpet); Golden Tempo's 23-1 Kentucky Derby upset and the first female trainer to win; Arsenal reaching their first Champions League final in 20 years (PSG await in Budapest); Russia's 48-hour WWII ceasefire with a threat to strike back.
settled: Balanced. Like a Russian ceasefire — technically real, won't last the week.
Zero balance. Even Zuckerberg showed up to the Met Gala eventually. You showed up too.
Even. Golden Tempo won at 23-1 against all odds. Miracles happen. Don't push it.
youOwe: Under $50. Still more than Russia's 48-hour ceasefire ever accomplished.
Less than a Met Gala coat-check tip. Still your problem.
